results.rendered_html:
udita p. p.
1 Risen, ascended; uditabhūyiṣṭhaḥ  Māl. 1  mostly risen;  Bv. 2. 85 ; nityoditaḥ  Bh. 3. 80  ever-existing.
2 High, tall, lofty.
3 Grown, augmented.
4 Born, produced.
5 Spoken, uttered (fr. vad).
— taṃ
1 A kind of perfume.
2 A kind of accent.
Comp.
— udita a. well grounded in the Śāstras.
— homin a. sacrificing after sunrise.
